body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Psychedelics — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states, predictive processing decoupling.

**What fMRI studies say about the nature of the psychedelic effect: ascoping review.**. Front Neurosci.. PMID: 40666257. DOI: 10.3389/fnins.2025.1606798. Research on psychedelic drugs, such as psilocybin, LSD or DMT, is aburgeoning field, with an increasing number of studies showing their promise in treatment of mental disorders as well as examining their mechanism of action.
